Example

Enum PlanUncertaintyType

Namespace
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.Types
Assembly
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.Types.dll

Plan uncertainty type indicates the usage of associated uncertainty parameters, see PlanUncertainty.

public enum PlanUncertaintyType

Fields

BaselineShiftUncertainty = 3

Used for target shift. The target is positioned correctly, but other organs have been moved in relation to the target.

IsocenterShiftUncertainty = 2

Used for patient setup uncertainty. It is assumed that all organs have shifted.

RangeUncertainty = 1

Used for proton uncertainty plans.

RobustOptimizationUncertainty = 4

Uncertainty parameters used in robust optimization.

UncertaintyTypeNotDefined = 0

Indicates an undefined uncertainty type.

Made with docfx
